details: Scaffolded bun test setup and sanity checked the environment. Audited the codebase.

task: Task 1 - Audit ActiveConnectionProvider & Implement SSH Ping API
details: Moved localStorage sync logic into setActiveConnection callback to fix hydration race conditions erasing credentials. Replaced previous testDatabaseConnection TanStack start fn with a proper /api/test-connection Rest endpoint wrapped in withTunnel. Verified with new unittests using JSDOM.
